examples: The rate at which hair grows can be agonizingly slow.
They were, at least, agonizingly aware of the easy money in the vicinity.
The tortoise crept along at an agonizingly slow speed.
Both men hit fine shots to the closing par-four hole, with Watney's putt coming up agonizingly short.
An agonizingly intense, almost unbearably beautiful first feature from the writer-director Evan Glodell.
